scripts.check: pnpm --filter @codexdock/protocol build && pnpm --filter @codexdock/sdk build && pnpm --filter @codexdock/codex-adapter build && pnpm -r --sort check
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @codexdock/protocol build && pnpm --filter @codexdock/sdk build && pnpm --filter @codexdock/example-web dev
scripts.worker: pnpm --filter @codexdock/protocol build && pnpm --filter @codexdock/codex-adapter build && pnpm --filter codexdock worker
